title: EXT_camera_physical glTF Camera Extension
description: glTF extension whose primary purpose is preserving the authored focal length and physical sensor size of a perspective camera, with optional secondary physical-camera metadata.

focalLength.description: The lens focal length, in meters.

sensorSize.description: The physical sensor size as [width, height], in meters.

fStop.description: The lens f-number (focal length divided by the entrance pupil diameter). Used by renderers that support depth of field.

focusDistance.description: The distance from the camera to the plane of focus, in meters. Used by renderers that support depth of field.
